title: [Tracking issue] Add first-class support for Drasi
body:
This issue tracks all of the Dapr Agents-related tasks for a Drasi integration with Dapr Agents, which helps build business event-driven agent workflows.

Project context: https://summerofcode.withgoogle.com/programs/2026/projects/qbtyohoJ
Drasi: https://drasi.io/
Drasi tracking issue: drasi-project/drasi-platform#435

- [ ] #646
- [ ] #631
